metadata.description: Hamzaish's portable craft plugins — reusable, stack-agnostic capability suites that travel into any product repo. Distinct from Hamzaish's own operating skills in factory/skills/, which only make sense inside Hamzaish.

plugins.name: web-launch
plugins.description: Verification-gated website launch system: 14-phase checklist (Done ≠ Verified), refuse-to-launch sign-off gate, Day 1/3/7/14/30 monitoring cadence, an anonymized failure-mode library, and programmatic-SEO-at-scale quality gates. Routes commodity SEO/security work to specialist plugins.
